schemaVersion.description: Identifies the canonical LuaPack v2 configuration shape.

entry.description: Path to the entry Lua file that kicks off dependency analysis.

output.description: Optional destination path for the generated bundle. When omitted, LuaPack should emit '<entry-name>_packed.lua' alongside the entry file.

modules.description: Module discovery and per-module bundling policy.

roots.description: Ordered search roots for module resolution. When omitted, the entry file directory should be used as the default root.

env.description: Environment variables that contribute additional search roots. This is opt-in in v2.

rules.description: Per-module policy keyed by module identifier.

fallback.description: Runtime fallback policy when a module is not bundled.

path.description: Optional explicit path to use instead of the default resolver result.

recursive.description: When false, skip dependency analysis for this module after it is resolved.
